claims.claim_text: ナショナル・グリッドは英国・米国の電力送電・ガス輸送インフラにおける規制独占権（英国RIIO規制・米国PUC規制）を保有し、新規参入が原理的に不可能な構造的独占ポジションにある
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Q4 2014 CEO Steve Holliday: 'The foundation for this success...is the real clarity we have today in our regulatory contracts and the benefits of the major reorganizations in both the U.K. and the U.S.' / 'Around 80% of regulatory arrangements reset recently.' / Q4 2015 HY: 'We are on track to deliver another year of asset growth and good returns. Investment proposition centers around owning a portfolio of businesses that can support an annual asset growth of 5% to 7%.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Steve Holliday)

claims.claim_text: ナショナル・グリッドの英国RIIO規制フレームワーク（8年間固定価格管理）は、TotEx削減（約1.9億ポンド）や安全・信頼性インセンティブを通じた超過報酬を可能にする構造で、規制許容ROE10.2%に対して14%のROEを達成している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Annual 2015 CFO Andrew Bonfield: 'UK Electricity Transmission improved on its good start to RIIO. It delivered 280 basis points of incentive performance. TotEx savings of around GBP 190 million...we delivered 70 basis points from traditional incentives. Overall, the return on equity was 14% compared to a base allowance of 10.2%, a very good performance.'
claims.speaker: CFO (Andrew Bonfield)

claims.claim_text: ナショナル・グリッドは年間35億ポンドの投資プログラムにより規制資産ベース（RAB）を年5%成長させ、その成長がロンドン・トンネルプロジェクト等の大規模インフラ投資を通じて中長期的な収益成長の基盤となっている
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Annual 2014 CEO: 'Investment program continues, over GBP 3.4 billion, contributing to overall growth in regulated asset base of 5%.' / Annual 2015 CEO: 'Our investment program, at GBP 3.5 billion, was slightly up on last year.' / Q4 H1 2015: 'the tunnels under London...remain on schedule and underbudget. We've commissioned over 7 kilometers of those tunnels to date.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Steve Holliday)

claims.claim_text: ナショナル・グリッドの英国電力送電と米国送電・ガス配送の二大地理的ポートフォリオが、英国のRIIO規制と米国のPUC規制の異なるリスク特性でバランスを取り、収益の安定性と持続的配当成長（英国RPI連動）を支えている
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Annual 2015 CEO: 'The foundation for this success is the real clarity we have today in our regulatory contracts and the benefits of the major reorganizations in both the U.K. and the U.S.' / 'Earnings were up 9% to GBP 2.2 billion or 58.1p per share. Full dividend to 42.87p a share, an increase of 2% on the prior year, in line with the average U.K. RPI inflation.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Steve Holliday)

claims.claim_text: ナショナル・グリッドの英国における系統運用者（ESO）機能は、電力市場改革（EMR）・バランシング予備力調達（2400MW）等の複雑な市場制度の下で唯一の認可された系統管理事業者として参入障壁が極めて高い独自ポジションにある
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Annual 2014 CEO: 'In the U.K., in addition to running the networks, we have been -- perform an important role as system operator. The winter outlook report...We've procured 2,400 megawatts of supplemental and demand-side balancing reserve.' / 'Around GBP 70 million of savings will benefit consumers in the forms of reduced charges starting in 2015.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Steve Holliday)

claims.claim_text: ナショナル・グリッドの革新的な資産管理（ブレーカー改修の新手法等）とTotExアウトパフォーマンス能力は、規制フレームワーク内での超過利益（incentive returns）を継続的に獲得する実行力を示している
claims.evidence_from_transcript: H1 2015 CEO: 'We've now successfully piloted a completely new way of refurbishing the breakers. It significantly reduces the overall costs, what is a material spend for us throughout the 8-year period. Our continued focus and success with innovating and the different approaches is key to meeting the return objectives.' / Annual 2015 CFO: 'TotEx savings of around GBP 190 million, up GBP 120 million versus the prior year.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Steve Holliday) / CFO (Andrew Bonfield)

claims.claim_text: ナショナル・グリッドは88,000MWの発電事業者と接続契約を保有し、低炭素化・電化トレンドによる2020年代の送電能力拡張需要を先取りした長期インフラ投資パイプラインを持つ独自の構造的ポジションにある
claims.evidence_from_transcript: Annual 2015 CEO: 'we now have a smoother, longer-term profile of investments that go well into the 2020s, with today 88,000 megawatts of generation contracted with us to connect through that time frame.' / 'If policy is consistent and we decarbonize transportation and heat, there will be a need to increase capacity in the transmission system, and that will be a major driver of investment growth in the 2020s.'
claims.speaker: CEO (Steve Holliday)
